title: galium mollugo var. pallidum
intro: Galium mollugo var. pallidum is a variant of the cleaver plant, a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Galium mollugo var. pallidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
